Author: Briette
Name: Custom Sounds
Punchline:
No, it's not your imagination. Patch 7.5 changed some sound effects to be annoyingly high pitched!
Revert those changes plus setup other sounds like custom Quest Themes
Description:
Revert to pre-patch 7.5 system sound effects for less high pitched vendor and item retrieval noises.

Choose your Quest Accept/Complete sounds.

More sound options to come! Suggestions are welcome. Contact info on repo page
